rationale: Abstract Y is superior across every scored dimension because it articulates a specific, falsifiable aim, frames results with an unambiguous comparator direction, and is written with markedly greater clarity and logical flow.
loser_weakness: Abstract X most lacked clarity and gap specificity — the background used a vague 'remains to be elucidated' instead of a focused aim, and the results section presented comparisons in a confusing order without explicit directional framing.
